claim_bullets.bullet_text: Reg Braithwaite is the author of JavaScript Allongé, a book on programming from functions to classes in ECMAScript 2015 (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.297-297).

Braithwaite has authored libraries for JavaScript, CoffeeScript, and Ruby programming such as Allong.es, Method Combinators, Katy, JQuery Combinators, YouAreDaChef, andand, and others (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.297-297).

source_record_text: Reg “Raganwald” Braithwaite is the author of *JavaScript Allongé*, a book on programming from functions to classes in ECMAScript 2015.
